pokemon:pincurchin.name: Pincurchin
pokemon:pincurchin.summary: It stores electricity in each spine. Even if one gets broken off, it still continues to emit electricity for at least three hours.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It stores electricity in each spine. Even if one gets broken off, it still continues to emit electricity for at least three hours.
It feeds on seaweed, using its teeth to scrape it off rocks. Electric current flows from the tips of its spines.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It stores electricity in each spine. Even if one gets broken off, it still continues to emit electricity for at least three hours.
